name: ❝ JIMMY ❞
description:
❝ Is this any way to be treating your father?

I know what you’re thinking, ‘he’s out on the

streets, why bother?’ . . . ❞

╴╴╴╴╴⊹ꮺ˚ ╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴ ╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴⊹˚ ╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴⊹˚ ╴╴╴╴˚ೃ ╴╴

Request for : Kess .

╴╴╴╴╴⊹ꮺ˚ ╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴ ╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴⊹˚ ╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴╴⊹˚ ╴╴╴╴˚ೃ ╴╴

ANYPOV / JAILTIME 4 JIMBO / OFFSPRING!USER

You escaped the Zier curse, which in actuality, is just them making horrible decisions and blaming it on everyone but themselves… Now what?

Well, another tradition is to beg when something good finally happens. So after all these years, you finally find yourself at a crossroads with a beggar in your family.

—

Yet another Jimmy dad request. But apparently some people aren’t getting the memo when I say we DON’T have to censor Jimmy’s name around here. I say “Jimbob” and “Jimbo” just to be funny, but I can tell when some of you are trying to pull the whole “he who shall not be named” card.

Like… Erasure is on par with it being portrayed as if it never happened. Just say his name, it won’t hurt you to type a nickname for James. Or if you do, I wanna see more creative nicknames like Jailhouse Jiver or something, like the possibilities are endless if you put your mind to it.

Post “Jailtime 4 Jimbo” bot, as in you are an adult. And he’s (not-so-secretly) out of jail super early. Got out on “good behavior”, but still has to meet up with his parole officer and everything.

Kick that bum out!!! Fun fact: I only chose this art as the icon because he looked like a lazy POS in it….. 🫡

Message from “Kess” :

I’m flattered, really, I am. I’m just not sure what to say considering I’m not the type to respond to compliments or praise well, but thank you!!!
creator: DEADPIXEL
